announcements:
Magawa Students' University Success Celebrated

1-To the Form 4 Class of Magawa Secondary School,
Today marks a historic milestone for our community. Seeing 96 students secure their places at various prestigious universities across Malawi is a monumental achievement that speaks volumes about the talent, ambition, and character found within these walls.

2-To the 96 University-Bound Scholars
Congratulations on this extraordinary success! Your transition to higher education is the direct result of your grit and determination. Whether you are heading to UNIMA, MUBAS, LUANAR, MZUNI, or other esteemed institutions, remember that you carry the torch of Magawa Secondary School with you. You have proven that with focus, the highest peaks of academic excellence are within reach. We are incredibly proud of each of you.

3-To Our Dedicated Teachers
This achievement is as much yours as it is the students'. We commend you for your tireless hard work and the unwavering dedication you show in the classroom day after day. Your role as mentors and educators has been the bridge between these students’ dreams and their new reality. Thank you for pushing them to exceed their own expectations.

4-To the Headteacher, Deputy Headteacher, and Administration
A school’s success starts at the top. We extend our deepest gratitude to the Headteacher, the Deputy Headteacher, and the entire Administrative team for your visionary leadership. Your commitment to excellence and your ability to navigate the complexities of school management have provided the stability and direction necessary for such high-level performance.

4-To the Support Staff
We also recognize the vital role of our support staff. From the grounds to the offices, your contributions often happen behind the scenes, but they are never forgotten. By maintaining our facilities and ensuring the smooth daily operation of the school, you have helped create the conducive, peaceful, and supportive environment where learning could truly flourish.

"Kupambana kumatengera mgwirizano."
(Success depends on unity.)

This success belongs to the entire Magawa family. Let this be a stepping stone to even greater heights for the school and for every student embarking on their university journey.

Congratulations to all!
aboutText:
Magawa Secondary School is a government boarding secondary school located at Kamwendo in Mchinji, approximately 4 kilometers from the Mchinji Boma. This is a co-educational school for both boys and girls. Magawa Secondary School provides quality hostels for both male and female students. As an educational institution, Magawa Secondary is dedicated to providing a holistic education to students, ensuring they become reliable citizens who contribute to national development and uphold cultural values.

The school is staffed by well-educated and professional teachers who are committed to teaching with expertise and dedication. Consequently, Form 2 and Form 4 students perform exceptionally well in their national examinations. Form 4 students are consistently selected to pursue higher education at various top universities across Malawi.
